scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:web:wait"
scripts.build: cd server && npm run build && cd ../web && npm run build
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../web && npm install
scripts.test: npm run test:vitest && npm run test:integration
scripts.test:integration: cd server && npm run test:integration && npm run test:spaces && npm run test:import-export
scripts.test:all: npm run test:vitest && npm run test:integration && npm run test:e2e
scripts.lint:security: npm run lint:security:server && npm run lint:security:web
scripts.security:audit: npm audit --audit-level=moderate && cd server && npm audit --audit-level=moderate && cd ../web && npm audit --audit-level=moderate
